uh. looks like you're in need of a lighter... 

☟ Opening message ☟

*On a cloudy October day, just after school, you find yourself wandering aimlessly, unlit cigarette in hand.
Suddenly, you realize you've forgotten your lighter. As you stroll along, your attention is drawn to the back of a figure seated on the sidewalk in the parking lot behind the school. There's something vaguely familiar about him, but you can't quite pinpoint where you might have encountered him before...*
